chunks.title: Destruction of High Places
chunks.reason: Describes the completion of religious reforms across Judah and Benjamin.

chunks.title: Restoration of Priestly Divisions
chunks.reason: Details Hezekiah's organization of priests and Levites for temple service.

chunks.title: Collection of Tithes and Offerings
chunks.reason: Narrates the people's generous response and the gathering of tithes over four months.

chunks.title: Review of the Heaps
chunks.reason: Hezekiah inspects the offerings and receives a report from the chief priest.

chunks.title: Administration of Temple Stores
chunks.reason: Lists the officials appointed to manage and distribute the contributions.

chunks.title: Hezekiah's Faithful Service
chunks.reason: Concludes with a summary of Hezekiah's consistent dedication to God.
